message:
fix(core): replace remaining truncating epoch_ms casts in storage, mcp_tools, schema_gate

Final batch of `d.as_millis() as i64` → `i64::try_from` conversions:

- storage.rs: fix public now_ms() (used by events, cleanup, notifications),
  record_migration(), and three FTS sync/rebuild callsites (replaced inline
  epoch computation with now_ms() calls)
- mcp_tools.rs: fix two epoch casts in refresh cooldown and account record
- search/schema_gate.rs: fix SchemaSnapshot::now() epoch cast

Removes all #[allow(clippy::cast_possible_truncation)] suppressions on
epoch timestamp paths.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
